creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
On Wed, Aug 29, 2001 at 11:03:29PM -0700, Ken Harrenstien wrote:

> Further newsgroup search turned up an "answer" from a Kris Kennaway that
> said "Use the version of OpenSSL standard in FreeBSD".  I found this
> completely unhelpful -- if the right version were there, we won't
> have this problem to begin with!!  4.2-RELEASE has libcrypto.so.1
> but not .so.2.

The ports collection only supports the latest version of -stable.
FreeBSD 4.3-STABLE has libcrypto.so.2, so the package works.

You note a couple of other bogons which probably do need to be fixed.

Kris
